'''Epoh Trebor''' was a famous [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] entertainer who, during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], was a driving force behind the entertainment tours that traveled across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] entertaining [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] troops and personnel on the battlefields. At the time he visited the backwater, war-ridden world of [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] he was one of the HoloNet's most enduring entertainers and still extremely popular. Some, however, found his humor to be overly sentimental and a bit too party line.

==Behind the scenes==
Epoh Trebor is "Robert Hope" backwards, a reference to the legendary comedian Bob Hope. However, Hope's given first name was Leslie.
